# truenas_catalog (Data Source)

Provides information about the singleton TrueNAS SCALE application catalog.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "truenas_catalog" "official" {}

output "catalog_label" {
  value = data.truenas_catalog.official.label
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) Catalog ID (always 'catalog' for the singleton).
- `label` (String) Catalog label (typically TRUENAS).
- `location` (String) On-disk location of the catalog data.
- `preferred_trains` (List of String) List of preferred catalog trains.
